---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for the skill package
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which skill does this relate to?**
- [ ] Skill 01: Interviewer
- [ ] Skill 02: Resume Writer
- [ ] Skill 03: Job Search Expert
- [ ] Skill 04: Interview Prep
- [ ] Skill 05: Mock Interviewer
- [ ] New skill (describe below)
- [ ] Package-wide

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or limitation you encountered. Be specific about what the skill currently does and why it falls short.

**What would you like to see?**
Describe the capability or behavior you are proposing. If you have a specific implementation idea, include it here.

**Who does this help?**
Describe the user population this would benefit. For example: career changers, new graduates, candidates in specific industries, international users.

**Have you seen this done elsewhere?**
If you have seen a similar capability in another tool or resource, describe it here. This helps with scoping and implementation.

**Additional context**
Any other information that would help evaluate this request.
